subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the gathering of friends! The lamp set ablaze is consumed in burning and yearning, and His heart is stirred by the fragrances of the favours of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محفل یاران سراج افروخته در سوز و گداز است و قلبش از نفحات الطاف حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
